metadata.title: GateCtr is Live on Product Hunt 🚀
metadata.description: Stop LLM bill shock. Budget firewall for any AI API, in 5 minutes. Free plan, no credit card.
metadata.ogTitle: GateCtr is Live on Product Hunt 🚀
metadata.ogDescription: Stop LLM bill shock. Budget firewall for any AI API — OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Gemini. Free plan.

hero.headline: Stop LLM bill shock.
hero.headlineSub: Budget firewall for any AI API.
hero.description: GateCtr sits between your app and any LLM. Change one line. Get instant budget caps, ~40% token savings, automatic model routing, and real-time analytics.
hero.social: No credit card required. Free plan forever.

offer.headline: 3 months Pro — free for the first 100 upvoters.
offer.description: Use code PRODUCTHUNT26 at checkout. Valid 48 hours only.
offer.note: Applies to monthly or yearly Pro plan.

integration.headline: Works with your existing code.
integration.description: Change the base URL. That's it. Your app keeps working.

items.title: Budget Firewall
items.description: Set hard caps per project. Auto-block when reached. Soft alerts at 80% via Slack, Teams, or custom webhook.

items.title: Context Optimizer
items.description: Compresses prompts before forwarding. Removes whitespace, duplicates, and AI filler. ~40% token savings on average.

items.title: Model Router
items.description: Automatically picks the cheapest available model. Auto-fallback if a provider goes down. No code change needed.

items.title: Real-time Analytics
items.description: Token usage by project, provider, and user. Day-by-day trends, cost breakdown, latency tracking.

makerNote.headline: A note from the founder
makerNote.body: I built GateCtr after a side project generated a $340 OpenAI bill overnight — no alert, no cap. I couldn't find a lightweight SaaS fix. So I built one. Today, we're shipping. Would love your support and your honest feedback.

cta.headline: Ready to stop overpaying for LLMs?
cta.description: Free plan includes 50k tokens/month. No credit card required.
